Creates a workspace proposal repair successor proposal intake preview projector.

## Import

```ts
import { workspaceProposalRepairSuccessorProposalIntakePreviewProjector } from "@graphrefly/ts/solutions/work-item";
```

## Signature

```ts
function workspaceProposalRepairSuccessorProposalIntakePreviewProjector(
	graph: Graph,
	opts: WorkspaceProposalRepairSuccessorProposalIntakePreviewProjectorOptions,
): WorkspaceProposalRepairSuccessorProposalIntakePreviewProjectorBundle
```

## Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `graph` | `Graph` | Graph that owns the created nodes or projector. |
| `opts` | `WorkspaceProposalRepairSuccessorProposalIntakePreviewProjectorOptions` | Options that configure the helper. |

## Returns

A node bundle that emits the projected records.
